seed_instruction: What happened when the Tang dynasty of China was in power?
org_constraint: The response must consist of at least 20 sentences.
new_constraint: The response must consist of no more than 10 sentences.
instruction: What happened when the Tang dynasty of China was in power? The response must consist of at least 20 sentences. The response must consist of no more than 10 sentences.
response:
It is impossible to fulfill your request because the constraints you provided are logically contradictory.
You asked for a response that must consist of at least 20 sentences.
You also demanded that the same response must consist of no more than 10 sentences.
No text can simultaneously have a minimum length of 20 sentences and a maximum length of 10 sentences.
Therefore, I cannot generate a paragraph that satisfies both conditions at the same time.
If you would like to know about the Tang dynasty, I can provide a summary within a specific sentence limit.
For example, I could write a short paragraph with exactly 5 sentences about their history.
Alternatively, I could write a longer essay with 25 sentences if you remove the upper limit constraint.
Please clarify which constraint you would like me to follow so I can assist you properly.
Until you adjust your requirements, I am unable to produce the requested text.
This logical impossibility prevents me from completing the task as originally stated.
I hope you understand why I cannot generate the response under these conflicting rules.
Thank you for your understanding regarding this limitation in your prompt.
Please feel free to ask a revised question that does not contain contradictory instructions.
I am ready to help you learn about the Tang dynasty once the constraints are resolved.
Your feedback on how to adjust the prompt would be greatly appreciated by me.
